description: Live GitHub + WakaTime activity over the last 7 days.

data.summary: This week Ethan Qiu logged 5 hrs 31 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 4 hrs 17 mins. His work was spread across 5 projects, and the time was mainly in Java, TypeScript, Markdown, JSON, and other files. No GitHub commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded in the data.
